positioning.statement: Felipe Tavares is a senior enterprise and business architecture leader with 18 years across trading, banking, consulting and manufacturing industries. The consistent thread: translating complex trade and operational processes into defensible target architectures, and, increasingly, turning AI and data strategy into measurable business value. He leads in a global matrix and has moved architecture from gatekeeping to orchestrator and hands-on delivery.

hero.headline: Enterprise architecture and AI strategy, built to survive contact with the real business.
hero.slogan: Architecting AI ambition into enterprise reality.
hero.subhead: 18 years turning Architecture, AI, Data, Platform Engineering and Product Management strategies into shipped value.

skillDomains.name: AI & Agentic Engineering
skillDomains.blurb: Built the business case for 8-figure AI and data value in commodity trading, shipping AI-augmented architecture platforms hands-on.

skillDomains.name: Enterprise & Business Architecture
skillDomains.blurb: Leads a central architecture function: authored the Architecture Guiding Principles and architect behaviour model across a federated global org.

skillDomains.name: Data Architecture & Engineering
skillDomains.blurb: Architected the future-state of an 8-figure enterprise data platform (lakehouse, streaming, API-first), now underpinning trading domains.

skillDomains.name: Cloud & Platform Architecture
skillDomains.blurb: Drives a Platform-as-a-Product operating model on AWS: golden paths, IaC and Policy as Code, a Terraform pipeline catalogue.

skillDomains.name: Integration Architecture
skillDomains.blurb: Defined the enterprise future-state event-driven, API-led integration architecture and leads its adoption across global trading programs.

skillDomains.name: Digital Strategy & IT Strategy
skillDomains.blurb: Sets technology strategy for complex, regulated domains, including a multi-vendor buy-versus-build assessment for commodity trading systems.

skillDomains.name: Data Management & Analytics
skillDomains.blurb: Delivered data products credited with a double-digit-million revenue uplift, plus multi-million-dollar cost reductions across the product-data estate.

skillDomains.name: Software & Agentic Engineering
skillDomains.blurb: Builds hands-on: an in-house AI-augmented architecture platform that auto-assembles context for delivery teams and AI coding assistants.

skillDomains.name: SAP Delivery, Strategy & Architecture
skillDomains.blurb: Led SAP S/4HANA business architecture and order-to-cash transformations, cutting the cost of a heavily customized system by half.

skillDomains.name: Portfolio & Program Management
skillDomains.blurb: Management-team member on a 9-figure cloud migration program, with functional direction across a large architecture and engineering organization.

skillDomains.name: Product Management & Agile Delivery
skillDomains.blurb: SCRUM and SAFe practitioner, CSPO and CSM certified. Brought agile delivery discipline to ERP/treasury and architecture operating models.

skillDomains.name: Technology Leadership & Org Design
skillDomains.blurb: Directly led multiple engineering, architecture and product teams, each with its own lead, and hundreds more through a federated, matrix operating model.

statements: Directly led multiple engineering, architecture and product teams, each with its own lead
Led hundreds of people across teams through a matrix operating model
18 years across trading, banking, consulting and manufacturing industries
Moved architecture from gatekeeping to orchestrator and hands-on delivery

cards.title: Mentoring
cards.body: I mentor engineers and architects working through those exact questions: how to structure a system, how to grow into the next role.

cards.title: Advisory conversations
cards.body: I sit on internal architecture and governance boards, and advise founders building in adjacent spaces. If you want a second opinion on a target architecture or an early AI bet, that's the conversation.

cards.title: Speaking & panels
cards.body: I speak on architecture, AI strategy, and technology leadership at conferences, panels, and in education settings. Specifics, not slideware.

dossier.summary: Sr. Principal Architect Leader with 18 years across trading, banking, consulting and manufacturing industries. Director-level enterprise-architecture leadership, leading a central architecture function with functional direction over a large architecture and engineering organization (typically ≈10 direct, 20+ dotted-line). Leads enterprise and business architecture, AI, and data strategy across a global Fortune 500 organization's Agriculture and Trading and Data and Integration portfolios, including enterprise CTRM strategy. Built the business case attributing 8-figure value to AI and data initiatives, and architected the future-state of an 8-figure enterprise data platform. Moves architecture from gatekeeping to orchestrator and hands-on delivery.

competencyMatrix.evidence: Architecture Guiding Principles, architect behaviour model, and global architecture governance process across a federated organization.
Defined the enterprise future-state event-driven, API-led integration architecture and leads its adoption across global trading programs.
8-figure AI/data value business case; built an in-house AI-augmented architecture platform (event-driven, CQRS, hexagonal) hands-on.
Architected the future-state of an 8-figure enterprise data platform (lakehouse, streaming, API-first consumption), plus MDM/data governance architecture.
Drives a Platform-as-a-Product operating model on AWS: golden paths, IaC and Policy as Code, a Terraform pipeline catalogue.
Multi-vendor buy-versus-build assessment and hybrid target architecture for global commodity trading systems; commodities technology strategy and roadmap.
Delivered data products credited with a double-digit-million revenue uplift, plus multi-million-dollar cost reductions across the product-data estate.
Builds hands-on: an in-house AI-augmented architecture platform that auto-assembles a queryable context layer for delivery teams and AI coding assistants.
Led SAP S/4HANA business architecture and order-to-cash transformations, including a rollout that cut maintenance cost of a customized system by more than half.
Management-team member on a 9-figure cloud migration program; functional direction across a large architecture and engineering organization spanning trading, integration, and data.
CSPO & CSM certified; SCRUM/SAFe delivery leadership.
Directly led multiple engineering, architecture and product teams, each with its own lead, and hundreds of people across teams through a matrix operating model.

education.school: Universidade Federal do Estado do Rio de Janeiro (UNIRIO)
